title: The metabolomics approach revealed a distinctive metabolomics pattern associated with hyperthyroidism treatment.
author: Jaber MA Benabdelkamel H Dahabiyeh LA Masood A AlMalki RH Musambil M Alfadda AA Abdel Rahman AM
content:
S-EPMC9685425 PMC9685425 The metabolomics approach revealed a distinctive metabolomics pattern associated with hyperthyroidism treatment.

Background

Hyperthyroidism is characterized by increased thyroid hormone production, which impacts various processes, including metabolism and energy
